speaker: speaker1
text: What can I get for you today ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Could I get a hamburger , please ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Would you like cheese on that ?

speaker: speaker1
text: What kind of soda would you like ?

speaker: speaker2
text: May I have a Sprite , please ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I would also like a bag of chips .
